member.name: P:Cucumber.HtmlFormatter.HtmlReportSettings.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the title of the HTML report. Default is "Cucumber".

member.name: P:Cucumber.HtmlFormatter.HtmlReportSettings.Icon
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon for the HTML report. Default is the Cucumber icon as a base64-encoded SVG.

member.name: P:Cucumber.HtmlFormatter.HtmlReportSettings.CustomCss
member.summary: Gets or sets custom CSS to include in the HTML report. Default is empty.

member.name: P:Cucumber.HtmlFormatter.HtmlReportSettings.CustomScript
member.summary: Gets or sets custom Javascript to include after the main Javascript section of the HTML report. Default is empty.

member.name: P:Cucumber.HtmlFormatter.HtmlReportSettings.JavascriptResourceLoader
member.summary: Gets or sets the function that loads the main Javascript resource for the HTML report. This should only be customized if you use a custom node.js project to serve the HTML report, for smaller customizations you can use the and property.

member.name: P:Cucumber.HtmlFormatter.HtmlReportSettings.CssResourceLoader
member.summary: Gets or sets the function that loads the main CSS resource for the HTML report. This should only be customized if you use a custom node.js project to serve the HTML report, for smaller customizations you can use the and property.

member.name: M:Cucumber.HtmlFormatter.HtmlReportSettings.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance of HtmlReportSettings with default values.
